title: The Crew Reaches the Floating Restaurant Baratie
description: On pages 8–11, the crew reaches the floating restaurant Baratie, where Luffy’s impulsiveness, Fullbody’s arrogance, and Sanji’s sharp code collide.
scene: The Baratie is loud, violent, and rule-bound: cooks fight like pirates, customers cause trouble, and Sanji’s character begins to emerge through conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Gomu Gomu No...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Bauoon!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The hell!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You can have your cannonball back!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Just who are you giving it to, you dumbass!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ugh...

dialogue.speaker: Fullbody
dialogue.text: Look, the one sitting over there is it. Fullbody...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: No way, a marine lieutenant is eating here?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Look how graceful he is...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Amazing, you're the center of attention.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Oh please, I'm sure they're all looking at you.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: MM! This delicate scent!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: It must be from Micqueot of the Northern Lands!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: And this slight sourness mixed with a thick, dry taste... this wine must be... itelzbulger Stein!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Am I wrong, waiter!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Not even close, sir.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Oh and by the way, I'm actually the assistant head chef. I'm only temporarily filling in for the waiters who all ran away yesterday.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: restaurant on the sea's assistant head chef SAN J1

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Here's your soup, sir.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Please enjoy it while it's still hot!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hey, don't laugh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: B-But he was so sure of himself! PFFT!

summary: This part introduces the Baratie as more than a restaurant; it is a battlefield of pride, hunger, and harsh principles that will define Sanji’s arc.
